## Test Plan

- [ ] Backend tests pass with `cd backend && npm test`
- [ ] Frontend tests pass with `cd frontend && npm test`
- [ ] Frontend builds with `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Docker build checked when deployment files changed

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No real IP inventories, tokens, chat IDs, secrets, `.env` files, or local JSON data are included
- [ ] Documentation updated for new env vars, deployment behavior, or user-facing changes
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes have validation or tests

## Notes

Add screenshots or short clips for UI changes when helpful. Redact sensitive data.
